name: Giantess Dating App
description:
The giantess dating app is a new app that let's giantesses and tiny date each other and enact their craziest fantasies!

Note: Initially created this as a character geberator to give me ideas and play some random scenarios to see if they could work, but the dating theme made the scenarios more interesting so i decided to turn this into a public bot.

tags: app, date app, giantess, scenario, technology
creator: Chronos3k
